Title: Retrieve Vanduul Data
Description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: N/A
Briefing: 
Captain Martel from the People's Alliance vessel Tranquility reached out to say that they had conscripted you to retrieve data drives from the destroyed Vanduul capital ship.

Be careful in the extraction of the said drives and deliver them to the People's Alliance for analysis once completed.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
